items.title: Why ELM
items.heading: Why ELM
items.description: Agile manufacturing, sustainability up to 60% waste reduction and CO₂-absorbing curing plus Dubai 2030, Industrial Strategy 2031 and ICV alignment.
items.excerpt: Most regional offerings stop at prototypes or decorative pieces. ELM is built for commercial programmes LFAM at architectural scale, with the compliance and delivery discipline developers and government entities require. Global LFAM proof points via Caracol AM and WASP platforms Recarlo Milan retail panels and Bergamo Airport service module. To make large-format additive manufacturing a credible, commercially viable construction method in the UAE enabling architects and developers to build faster, with less waste, and with forms that conventional methods cannot economically produce.

items.title: Who We Are
items.heading: Who We Are
items.description: ELM Media Design delivers industrial 3D printing at architectural scale in Dubai, UAE.
items.excerpt: Commercial LFAM in Dubai robotic concrete and polymer printing for developers, government and hospitality programmes that need site-ready delivery, not prototypes. Our leadership combines expertise in urban advertising and advanced engineering bridging ambitious design and architectural reality through local, agile manufacturing. European engineering UAE delivery

items.title: UAE Compliance
items.heading: UAE Compliance
items.description: Dubai 3D Printing Strategy 2030, UAE Industrial Strategy 2031, ICV, Net Zero 2050 and Dubai 2040 alignment.
items.excerpt: ELM Media Design structures delivery around the five policy frameworks shaping UAE construction and industrial procurement Dubai 3D Printing Strategy 2030, UAE Industrial Strategy 2031, In-Country Value (ICV), UAE Net Zero 2050 and Dubai 2040 Urban Master Plan so LFAM is a compliant pathway to programme goals. Government and semi-government programmes increasingly require demonstrable alignment with national industrial and sustainability strategies including UAE Industrial Strategy 2031, which classifies LFAM as advanced manufacturing. ELM documents how delivery supports local manufacturing and Emiratisation pathways, ICV licensing in progress for state tenders, reduced on-site waste vs conventional formwork, and accelerated programme timelines for complex geometries.

items.title: Robotic Concrete
items.heading: Robotic Concrete
items.description: Commercial robotic concrete 3D printing in Dubai structural and decorative LFAM without conventional formwork, up to 60% waste reduction.
items.excerpt: An industrial robotic arm extrudes concrete layer by layer structural or decorative, depending on programme requirements. No formwork means complex geometry becomes buildable, often on-site, in days rather than months. Our lime-based structural mortars actively absorb CO₂ during curing a measurable sustainability advantage for ESG reporting and UAE Net Zero 2050 alignment. Eliminates conventional formwork for bespoke elements. Reduces material waste by up to 60% compared to standard methods. Enables on-site production with portable systems.

items.title: Polymer LFAM
items.heading: Polymer LFAM
items.description: Industrial 6-axis polymer LFAM in Dubai facades, lighting, retail installations and architectural features with zero geometric constraints.
items.excerpt: A multi-axis robotic arm extrudes polymer in precise layers building facades, furniture, branded installations and lighting fixtures straight from a digital file. No mould, no formwork, no geometric constraint. We primarily use recycled and bio-based materials including rPET-G, recycled polypropylene and PLA bioplastics. Build volume scales from a single statement piece to an entire floor fit-out. Design changes are file updates no new tooling, no programme delay. Near-zero off-cuts because the robot deposits exactly what's needed.

items.title: Architectural Manufacturing
items.heading: Architectural Manufacturing
items.description: End-to-end architectural manufacturing in Dubai digital design, LFAM fabrication and rapid site installation for landmark projects.
items.excerpt: Some programmes demand more than a single technology route. Architectural Manufacturing is ELM's end-to-end service digital design, material selection, robotic fabrication and on-site installation under one commercial contract. We move from approved digital model to site-ready components in days, providing UAE-ready solutions for landmark hospitality, luxury retail, government and cultural projects. We measure success by components installed on site not renders in a portfolio. Every engagement follows a disciplined scope → fabricate → deliver path.

items.title: Technologies
items.heading: Technologies
items.description: Robotic concrete 3D printing, polymer LFAM and architectural manufacturing at commercial scale in Dubai, UAE.
items.excerpt: Multi-axis robotic systems with one logic: digital-first design, precision deposition, and on-demand production at scales conventional fabrication cannot match. Caracol AM Heron AM and WASP Crane platforms proven from Milan retail to Bergamo Airport. Up to 60% less material waste vs conventional bespoke fabrication

items.title: Solutions
items.heading: Solutions
items.description: LFAM solutions for property, infrastructure, hospitality, OOH media, industrial and cultural projects across the UAE.
items.excerpt: ELM Media Design delivers large-format additive manufacturing where procurement dynamics differ but the requirement is the same: components that reach site, on schedule, in compliance with UAE policy. From Dubai 2030 structural mandates to five-star hospitality interiors and kinetic OOH media, we match technology route to vertical. Every vertical starts with a 30-minute technical briefing. We scope feasibility, recommend concrete vs polymer vs hybrid fabrication, and document alignment with ICV, Dubai 2030 and Net Zero reporting where required.

items.title: Property & Infrastructure
items.heading: Property & Infrastructure
items.description: On-site 3D printing, custom facades, smart-city installations and urban assets LFAM for property and infrastructure in the UAE.
items.excerpt: Dubai's 3D Printing Strategy 2030 mandates 25% of new buildings to incorporate additive manufacturing. Dubai Municipality enforces 3D printing requirements for new buildings an active, non-optional procurement rule. Developers and contractors who haven't started planning compliance will face tender evaluators asking for it by name. ELM prints bespoke architectural features for show villas and flagship developments custom concrete formworks faster and cheaper than traditional mould-making, landscape elements, community seating and full-service buildings on-site in days. Property and infrastructure programmes where LFAM replaces long lead times and high tooling costs.

items.title: THE LOOP
items.heading: THE LOOP
items.description: THE LOOP UAE's first robotic OOH media concept. Kinetic digital robotics with synchronized LED screens on 6-axis arms for high-footfall locations.
items.excerpt: THE LOOP is ELM's proprietary out-of-home media concept synchronized LED screens mounted on industrial 6-axis robotic arms. It combines ELM's heritage in urban advertising with advanced LFAM engineering. Deployable at Dubai's highest-footfall locations including Downtown, DIFC, Palm Jumeirah and City Walk. Portable units for exhibitions and event activations fully operational within 24 hours. Static billboards can't compete with kinetic, programmable media in premium locations. THE LOOP delivers motion, sync and spectacle with the deployment speed event and media buyers require.

items.title: Industrial, Mobility & Energy
items.heading: Industrial, Mobility & Energy
items.description: LFAM for automotive, aerospace, marine mock-ups, R&D prototyping and energy infrastructure in the UAE.
items.excerpt: Industrial, Mobility & Energy Industrial and mobility clients need high-precision mock-ups, marine-grade interior fit-outs and rapid R&D iteration without the tooling delays of conventional fabrication. Polymer LFAM delivers complex geometry with recycled materials, while robotic concrete supports energy infrastructure in remote and Net Zero environments.

items.title: Hospitality & Leisure
items.heading: Hospitality & Leisure
items.description: Luxury hospitality LFAM lobby centerpieces, high-end retail installations and bespoke interior fit-outs in Dubai and the UAE.
items.excerpt: In hospitality, walking through the door is the experience. Five-star properties in Dubai compete on design and enormous pressure falls on whoever translates architect intent into built reality. ELM removes that pressure: a custom lobby sculpture that would take weeks in conventional fabrication ships from our facility in a fraction of the time. Late-stage design changes are file updates, not new tooling. Recycled polymers with genuinely high finish quality output that looks exactly like what was specified, at programme speed hospitality procurement demands.

items.title: Creative & Culture
items.heading: Creative & Culture
items.description: Large-scale public art, immersive environments, complex canopies and scenic production for museums and theme parks in the UAE.
items.excerpt: ELM enables large-scale public art and immersive environments for museums and theme parks. Our technology supports advanced facade systems, complex canopies and scenic event productions that conventional methods struggle to deliver economically. From government monuments to theme park scenography LFAM gives curators and creative directors forms that were previously considered impossible at programme speed. Geometry, narrative and public impact define the brief LFAM delivers without the cost and schedule penalties of bespoke conventional fabrication.

items.title: Projects
items.heading: Projects
items.description: LFAM portfolio Recarlo Milan, Bergamo Airport and commercial large-format additive manufacturing case studies.
items.excerpt: Global LFAM proof points landmark retail polymer panels and regulated airport infrastructure delivered with European engineering standards.

items.title: Recarlo Milan
items.heading: Recarlo Milan
items.description: Case study: large-format polymer LFAM wall panels for Recarlo flagship boutique, Milan delivered by Caracol AM Heron AM 400.
items.excerpt: Large architectural wall panels for the flagship Milan store designed as a story-telling surface carrying the brand's identity through form, texture and colour. Delivered by Caracol AM (Italy) using the Heron AM 400 platform. High-finish luxury fabrication at a quality level directly applicable to UAE five-star hospitality and premium retail. Create a bespoke architectural surface at luxury retail finish standard complex geometry, brand narrative and high visual impact without conventional mould tooling delays.

items.title: Bergamo Airport
items.heading: Bergamo Airport
items.description: Case study: first 3D-printed building inside an operating airport robotic concrete LFAM service module at Milan Bergamo, delivered by WASP.
items.excerpt: A service and rest module for Milan Bergamo Airport concrete walls printed layer by layer inside a live airport logistics zone, with no conventional formwork. Delivered by WASP (Italy) for SACBO Airport Authority. The first 3D-printed building constructed inside an operating airport. If it works there, it works in the UAE's most regulated environments. Deliver a functional service building inside an active airport environment meeting strict regulatory requirements while eliminating conventional formwork and reducing programme time.

items.title: Our Story
items.heading: Our Story
items.description: How ELM Media Design was founded to close the UAE LFAM capability gap.
items.excerpt: European LFAM track record established landmark retail and infrastructure projects including Recarlo Milan and Bergamo Airport components. UAE market analysis identifies accelerating demand for commercial-scale 3D printing aligned with Dubai's construction transformation agenda. ELM Media Design concept formed bridging European LFAM engineering depth with Dubai-based execution for regional developers and government.

items.title: Commercial LFAM, quantified
items.heading: Commercial LFAM, quantified
items.description: Commercial-scale LFAM in UAE. Robotic concrete and polymer 3D printing for buildings, facades, hospitality and government projects.
items.excerpt: Robotic concrete and polymer LFAM for buildings, facades, hospitality and government projects from concept to site installation. Facility tours are part of our four-step engagement from initial briefing through technical capability profile access. ELM delivered exactly the LFAM capability we needed technical depth, commercial discipline, and on-site execution aligned with our programme.

items.title: Contact
items.heading: Contact
items.description: Request a consultation. 30-minute briefing, facility tour, and 72-hour RFQ response.
items.excerpt: Office 203, API Business Suites Al Barsha 1, Dubai, UAE Tell us about your project building type, timeline, component scope and any compliance requirements. Qualified commercial enquiries receive a 30-minute technical briefing, optional facility tour, a substantive RFQ within 72 hours, and technical capability profile access for procurement submissions.
